episodes.name: Finding Vikram
episodes.overview: Chandrayaan-2's failure sparks national disappointment. Contact with the Vikram lander is lost, causing anxiety for programmer Arjun and doubt for mission coordinator Yamini.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/vj58wrpx0fyg/space-gen-chandrayaan-s01e01-finding-vikram-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Man vs Machine
episodes.overview: The Failure Analysis Committee probes Chandrayaan-2's failure. Although Yamini defends her team, Arjun faces scrutiny. Meanwhile, Ramaiah reluctantly agrees to be the ISRO chief.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/m9ncqh1fd2uj/space-gen-chandrayaan-s01e02-man-vs-machine-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Science Finds a Way
episodes.overview: Chandrayaan-3 faces setbacks from budget cuts and political pressure, causing compromises. Yamini and Ramaiah clash, testing his leadership.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ww31o7zgyj5z/space-gen-chandrayaan-s01e03-science-finds-a-way-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Make in India
episodes.overview: The COVID-19 pandemic disrupts Chandrayaan-3. A failed launch threatens the mission, but Mohanty plays defence for the ISRO team.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/daogx5exsjkh/space-gen-chandrayaan-s01e04-make-in-india-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Where the Mind is Without Fear
episodes.overview: The launch is smooth, but the Moon race intensifies with Russia's Luna-25. As the ISRO team faces pressure, Arjun seeks solace in the memories of his father.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/0cok6u2fr9h2/space-gen-chandrayaan-s01e05-where-the-mind-is-without-fear-720p-jhs-web-dl-hindi-ddp5-1-h-264-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>
